name: Oat Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (rolled oats, flour, wheat germ, and salt) in one bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the wet ingredients (oil and water).
3. Combine the dry and wet mixtures until a dough forms.
4. Roll out the dough on an oiled cookie sheet to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
5. Score the crackers as desired.
6. Bake at 325°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until crisp.
